analyze_a_page_on_both_mobile_and_deskto: Analyze a page on both mobile and desktop and contrast the scores and vitals.
analyze_web_pages_for_performance_access: Analyze web pages for performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices using Google PageSpeed Insights API powered by Lighthouse.
analyze_webpage_performance_with_google_: Analyze webpage performance with Google PageSpeed Insights
capture_core_web_vitals_for_one_or_more: Capture Core Web Vitals for one or more pages to feed a monitoring history.
enter_your_google_pagespeed_api_key: Enter your Google PageSpeed API key
overall_loading_experience_category_fast: Overall loading experience category (FAST, AVERAGE, SLOW, or NONE)
run_a_pagespeed_insights_analysis_on_a_u: Run a PageSpeed Insights analysis on a URL and report scores and Core Web Vitals.
time_to_first_contentful_paint_display_v: Time to First Contentful Paint (display value)
time_to_first_contentful_paint_in_millis: Time to First Contentful Paint in milliseconds
time_to_largest_contentful_paint_display: Time to Largest Contentful Paint (display value)
time_to_largest_contentful_paint_in_mill: Time to Largest Contentful Paint in milliseconds
version_of_lighthouse_used_for_the_analy: Version of Lighthouse used for the analysis
